title: app.opengrep-rules.python.django.security.injection.raw-html-format
description: Detected user input flowing into a manually constructed HTML string. You may be accidentally bypassing secure methods of rendering HTML by manually constructing HTML and this could create a cross-site scripting vulnerability, which could let attackers steal sensitive user data. To be sure this is safe, check that the HTML is rendered safely. Otherwise, use templates (`django.shortcuts.render`) which will safely render HTML instead.
cwe_ids: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
code_excerpt:
content = """

Hello, {username}! This is your protected dashboard.

Session Information

Session ID: {session_id_short}...

Created: {created}

Last Active: {last_active}

Remember Me: {remember}

Active Sessions: {active_count}

Total Registered Users: {total_users}

Logout Logout All Sessions """.format( username=username, session_id_short=session_id[:16] if session_id else 'N/A', created=created, last_active=last_active, remember=remember, active_count=len(user_sessions), total_users=len(users_db), logout_url=url_for('logout'), logout_all_url=url_for('logout_all') )

title: app.opengrep-rules.python.lang.security.audit.formatted-sql-query
description: Detected possible formatted SQL query. Use parameterized queries instead.
cwe_ids: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
code_excerpt:
cursor.execute('''
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
            password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
            created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        )
    ''')

title: app.opengrep-rules.python.lang.security.audit.formatted-sql-query
description: Detected possible formatted SQL query. Use parameterized queries instead.
cwe_ids: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
code_excerpt:
cursor.execute('''
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS password_reset_tokens (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            email TEXT NOT NULL,
            token TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
            created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
            used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            FOREIGN KEY (email) REFERENCES users(email)
        )
    ''')

title: app.opengrep-rules.problem-based-packs.insecure-transport.js-node.using-http-server

owasp_categories: A02:2021 - Cryptographic Failures, A03:2017 - Sensitive Data Exposure

title: python.django.security.injection.raw-html-format.raw-html-format
description: Detected user input flowing into a manually constructed HTML string. You may be accidentally bypassing secure methods of rendering HTML by manually constructing HTML and this could create a cross-site scripting vulnerability, which could let attackers steal sensitive user data. To be sure this is safe, check that the HTML is rendered safely. Otherwise, use templates (`django.shortcuts.render`) which will safely render HTML instead.
cwe_ids: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
owasp_categories: A07:2017 - Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), A03:2021 - Injection, A05:2025 - Injection

Session Information

Session ID: {session_id_short}...

Created: {created}

Last Active: {last_active}

Remember Me: {remember}

Active Sessions: {active_count}

Total Registered Users: {total_users}

Logout Logout All Sessions """.format( username=username, session_id_short=session_id[:16] if session_id else 'N/A', created=created, last_active=last_active, remember=remember, active_count=len(user_sessions), total_users=len(users_db), logout_url=url_for('logout'), logout_all_url=url_for('logout_all') )

cwe_ids: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
owasp_categories: A05:2017 - Broken Access Control, A01:2021 - Broken Access Control, A01:2025 - Broken Access Control

title: javascript.lang.security.audit.path-traversal.path-join-resolve-traversal.path-join-resolve-traversal
description: Detected possible user input going into a `path.join` or `path.resolve` function. This could possibly lead to a path traversal vulnerability,  where the attacker can access arbitrary files stored in the file system. Instead, be sure to sanitize or validate user input first.
cwe_ids: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
owasp_categories: A05:2017 - Broken Access Control, A01:2021 - Broken Access Control, A01:2025 - Broken Access Control

title: javascript.express.security.audit.express-check-csurf-middleware-usage.express-check-csurf-middleware-usage
description: A CSRF middleware was not detected in your express application. Ensure you are either using one such as `csurf` or `csrf` (see rule references) and/or you are properly doing CSRF validation in your routes with a token or cookies.
cwe_ids: CWE-352: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
owasp_categories: A01:2021 - Broken Access Control, A01:2025 - Broken Access Control

title: python.flask.security.audit.debug-enabled.debug-enabled
description: Detected Flask app with debug=True. Do not deploy to production with this flag enabled as it will leak sensitive information. Instead, consider using Flask configuration variables or setting 'debug' using system environment variables.
cwe_ids: CWE-489: Active Debug Code

title: python.lang.security.use-defused-xml-parse.use-defused-xml-parse
description: The native Python `xml` library is vulnerable to XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.  These attacks can leak confidential data and "XML bombs" can cause denial of service. Do not use this library to parse untrusted input. Instead  the Python documentation recommends using `defusedxml`.
cwe_ids: CWE-611: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
owasp_categories: A04:2017 - XML External Entities (XXE), A05:2021 - Security Misconfiguration, A02:2025 - Security Misconfiguration
